channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/30)
channel.description: 今天的信息量有点大，但核心都围绕着“AI如何与代码更深度地融合”这个主题。从帮你写代码的Agent工具，到提升代码质量的检查器，再到关于AI编程能力的反思，都挺值得看看的。尤其值得注意的是，社区里已经有人在认真思考“AI生成的代码是不是变‘馊’了”，这个趋势洞察很关键。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的信息量有点大，但核心都围绕着“AI如何与代码更深度地融合”这个主题。从帮你写代码的Agent工具，到提升代码质量的检查器，再到关于AI编程能力的反思，都挺值得看看的。尤其值得注意的是，社区里已经有人在认真思考“AI生成的代码是不是变‘馊’了”，这个趋势洞察很关键。

item.title: UditAkhourii/adhd
item.description: ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Claude Agent SDK. Fans out parallel divergent thoughts under different cognitive frames, scores, prunes traps, deepens the survivors. The no-brainer skill for creative and interdisciplinary work. | 近期热门 | 总 519 stars
item.author: UditAkhourii

item.title: withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit
item.description: Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 12 agents, 32 skills. Kills context rot, ships features, not spaghetti. Claude Code & Codex. Any stack. 30 seconds | 近期热门 | 总 509 stars
item.author: withkynam

item.title: baoweise-bot/aimili-vpngate
item.description: aimili-vpngate是一个借助vpngate.net让Linux用干净ip出站的代理工具。 | 近期热门 | 总 434 stars
item.author: baoweise-bot

item.title: Sophomoresty/gemini-web2api
item.description: Convert Google Gemini web into OpenAI-compatible API. Zero auth, cross-platform, single file. | 近期热门 | 总 402 stars
item.author: Sophomoresty

item.title: MatinSenPai/SenPaiScanner
item.description: A light-weight scanner for Cloudflare IPs, written in Golang | 近期热门 | 总 372 stars
item.author: MatinSenPai

item.title: akitaonrails/ai-usagebar
item.description: Rust-based waybar widget to monitor status of Claude, GPT, GLM, OpenRouter plans/credits - inspired by claudebar/codexbar | 近期热门 | 总 115 stars
item.author: akitaonrails

item.title: vuejs-ai/vue-tui
item.description: The Vue framework for terminal UIs. SFC & JSX, Yoga flexbox, HMR, and testing out of the box. | 近期热门 | 总 70 stars
item.author: vuejs-ai

item.title: Ava Studio - 你的AI视频广告创意团队
item.author: Ava Studio

item.title: /monitor by Firecrawl - 当网页发生变化时通知您的AI代理
item.author: /monitor by Firecrawl

item.title: Firecoach AI - 将销售代表转变为顶尖表现者的AI角色扮演
